title: There Is No Authority But Yourself
original_title: There Is No Authority But Yourself
overview: A Dutch documentary about the history of the anarchist punk band Crass. The film features archival footage of the band, and interviews with former members Steve Ignorant, Penny Rimbaud and Gee Vaucher.
